positive: A minimalist, stylized botanical wreath composed of lush eucalyptus leaves, delicate silver sprigs, and intertwined gold foil accents. The arrangement should have a strong central symmetry, float against a crisp, creamy off-white background. Use a limited palette of muted sage greens, dusty blues, and metallic golds for maximum contrast and print pop. The aesthetic is elegant, Nordic-inspired, and suitable for textile printing, emphasizing clean lines and clear silhouettes. Vector art quality, digital painting style, isolated subject, perfect for apparel printing.
